allow: Bash(pip3 show jinja2 weasyprint plotly pandas pyyaml xxhash flask flask-socketio flask-cors eventlet 2>&1 | grep -E "^\(Name|Version\):")

Bash(python3 -c "import jinja2; print\('jinja2:', jinja2.__version__\)" 2>&1; python3 -c "import plotly; print\('plotly:', plotly.__version__\)" 2>&1; python3 -c "import pandas; print\('pandas:', pandas.__version__\)" 2>&1; python3 -c "import yaml; print\('pyyaml: ok'\)" 2>&1; python3 -c "import xxhash; print\('xxhash: ok'\)" 2>&1; python3 -c "import flask; print\('flask:', flask.__version__\)" 2>&1; python3 -c "import flask_socketio; print\('flask-socketio: ok'\)" 2>&1; python3 -c "import weasyprint; print\('weasyprint: ok'\)" 2>&1)
Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && pip install flask flask-socketio flask-cors eventlet jinja2 plotly pandas pyyaml xxhash 2>&1 | tail -20)
Bash(brew install exiftool fd rclone rdfind 2>&1 | tail -30)
Bash(exiftool -ver && ffprobe -version 2>&1 | head -1 && fd --version && rclone version 2>&1 | head -1 && rdfind --version 2>&1 | head -1)
Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "import jinja2, plotly, pandas, yaml, xxhash, flask, flask_socketio; print\('All Python packages OK'\)")
